ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Continued To Nov-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrea Ditullio, via ZOOM, for Sara Flynn, via ZOOM, Petitioner.

The parties are advised that the court has reviewed Ms. Ditullio's recent declaration filed on Oct-12-2021 and confirms that no one is appearing to object to the petition. The court confirms with Ms. Ditullio that the lost will has not been found. The court also confirms with Ms. Ditullio that the trust document has an original signature. The court advises the parties that it intends to grant the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated Feb-13-2017 will be admitted to probate. Sara Flynn will be appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III will be appointed probate referee. Status on close of estate will be set for Nov-01-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

The Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-05-2021 Continued To Oct-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Continued To Oct-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-29-2021 Continued To Jul-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Continued To Jun-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrea DiTullio, via ZOOM, counsel for Sara Flynn, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court questions counsel as to why her client is not present today as ordered in the order to appear issued by the court due to no appearance by any party at the previous hearing set in this matter. Counsel reports that her client had a scheduling conflict, so counsel advised her client that she was not required to appear today. The court reminds counsel that court orders must be followed. The court then points to the issue which must be addressed regarding probate code 6124 and the lack of notice to everyone named in the will. The court advises counsel that she will be required to meet notice requirements to everyone named in the will by the next calling of this matter in order for the petition to proceed. Counsel then reports that she will need additional time and requests fifteen day.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Probate of Lost Will is continued to June 29, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Order of Status Hearing (Order to Appear) is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-04-2021 Continued To Jun-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Petitioner/Proposed Executor, Sara L. Flynn, and the Attorney, Andrea Ditullo, to appear on June 01, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why there has been no response to the Examiner's notes. The court also notes that the Letters of Special Administration expire on May 04, 2021. The court will not be extending the Letters of Special Administration thus, currently there is no one in place who has authority to act on behalf of the Estate. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is also continued to June 01, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
